headline: Polen Focus Growth Bets on Lam Research (LRCX), a Critical Supplier of Etch and Deposition Equipment

headline: Lam Research and Universal Display Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a broad selloff swept through the semiconductor industry, sparked by concerns over the future of artificial intelligence spending and rising geopolitical risks.
